programme.title: Infinity Pool
programme.desc: Guided by a seductive and mysterious woman, a couple on holiday venture outside the resort grounds and find themselves in a culture filled with violence, hedonism and untold horror.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Married parents Tom and Kirsty check in to fulfil Toms fantasy of experimenting with another man. Natalie and Tom explore a threesome with Precious, insecurities could get in the way.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Vicky and Carl have brought their retirement plans forward and are now ready to move to Spain. Jean Johansson shows them what their £70k can buy on the southern Costa Blanca.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On Merseyside, the first to host is fun-loving oil and gas co-ordinator Danielle Greenwood, who has high hopes for her down-to-earth menu and her warm welcoming style of hosting.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The action on Merseyside continues with 24-year-old pastoral care manager Steven Booth the host. Steven is a mega Tina Turner fan and each of his courses is named after her songs.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Third to host on Merseyside is glamorous PR lady Jade Chantelle, who plans a casino-themed evening and is convinced her guests will be blown away by her high class menu, lashings of champagne and a game of roulette.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Primary school teacher Anna Senior is fourth to host on Merseyside. Anna plans a fairytale-themed evening, featuring a Mad Hatters soup and a sandwich, a special pork dish cooked three ways, and baked cheesecake.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: As the week in and around Merseyside draws to a close, its the turn of 36-year-old Michael Buble impersonator Jamie Somers to host. Can Jamie and Jade put their differences from last night aside?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host, teaching assistant Michelle, hopes to share her Portuguese and American culinary heritage. Describing herself as the drunk Martha Stewart, she believes the love she puts into her menu will compensate for less-than-perfect food.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On a spectacular second night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, self-styled culinary explorer Dave serves up a daring menu melding flavours that no one else would ever think of combining - there might be a reason for that!

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the third night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire and the turn of marketing executive Martina to cook. She hopes her menu of Thai curries and poached pears will impress her guests, one of whom doesnt like spice or fruit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, tech entrepreneur Shane, is hoping to wow his guests with a menu that draws on his Jamaican heritage. His ambitious menu flirts with triumph, and his strong gin martinis also raise the bar.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, lady of leisure Michaela attempts an Italian menu inspired by a favourite restaurant near her holiday home. But how high up the leaderboard can Michaelas Italian extravaganza reach?

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Kazal and Eleena are ditching Dubai and moving back home to Solihull to be close to extended family. Can they overcome building blunders to create the ultimate hosting hub?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In West London, dance-mad newlyweds Keon and Zoe are taking their first step onto the London property ladder and are looking for a family home with space for their favourite hobby: salsa-dancing.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: On Malta, we see Chris new kitchen from Italy no less! On the Costa Blanca, we revisit Jan and Bill at Casa Milly, that they named in honour of Bills mum.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Do Gary and Lynn still have the lawnmower that cut them a good deal in Haute-Vienne? And is Lorna and Brians Almería villa still making a splash?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire and Simon are starting a new adventure in Nerja in Spain. Will any of Craig Rowes options for their £230k get their hearts racing enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nikki and Gordon are on the hunt for a holiday home with great views on the island of Gozo. Ben Hillman shows them what their £350k can buy, but are any the Mediterranean dream?

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny follows brave buyers transforming properties bought at auction from derelict to diamond. Alison and Michael take on a pitfall palace in Guildford, while Jules and Al tackle a creaky Cornwall seven-bed BandB.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: For the first time since Edwin, Emmas tempted by romance again, with the handsome David. A sober Adele returns to Fairley Hall, threatening everything for Adam and Olivia. In the 1970s, Emma commands Paula to break off her romance with Jim Fairley.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Emma prepares the perfect Christmas for her family, but her unrelenting obsession with work and revenge brings danger to her door. In the 1970s, as Emma recovers from a heart attack, an oblivious Paula doubles down on her love affair with Jim.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A pedestrian is rushed to AandE with multiple life-threatening injuries after being injured in a hit-and-run. An acrobat has a damaged wrist. And a 93-year-old has a broken leg.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.desc: A love letter to journalists set at an outpost of an American newspaper in 20th century Paris and centers on three storylines.

programme.desc: Cops seek a car on clone plates that has racked up nearly 600 fines. PC Leslie pulls over a driver in a car thats not his, with no insurance and no licence.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: PC Tommy Wade is forced to ram a car to a stop - but why is the driver so desperate to get away from the cops? And police race to a serious two-car collision.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: A cop pursues a vehicle after a report of a cloned car with a balaclava-wearing driver. In Byker, PCs witness what looks like a drug deal through a car window.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: Police tackle a drink driver at 8am, an uninsured pizza delivery man, and a reckless driver wanting a selfie despite having no licence or insurance.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: Northumbria Police face a daily battle with dangerous and illegal motorbike use. In Newcastle, cops pursue - by car and chopper - a group riding off-road.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: An old Oxford girlfriend of Mulders asks for his help in an international case concerning the inexplicable execution of several British dignitaries, and they encounter an assassin who can produce fire from his bare hands.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: When death row inmate Luther Lee Boggs claims to be psychic and able to lead Mulder to a serial killer in return for a lesser sentence of life in prison, Scully becomes an unwilling believer.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A series of sexually oriented murders that are identical, except that the killer appears to be both male and female, draws Scully and Mulder to an Amish-type community of people who may be alien in origin.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Simon grapples with a juggernaut that has skidded off the M62 and is leaking diesel. Meanwhile, Rory deals with a mobile library that has been the victim of a shocking arson attack.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A luxury coach gives up the ghost on a busy motorway slip road. A straightforward job segues into disaster for Marta. Scott races to recover a damaged trailer before dark descends.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Jim must rescue a 32-tonne truck from a soft dirt embankment and Chris manoeuvres a skip lorry out of city centre traffic. Meanwhile, Marta is driven around the bend trying to deliver a 48-foot articulated bus.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Matt Adams is rustling up his roughest ride ever: Macca McReady sails into trouble with a precious load, and the Stephens brothers battle backyards an bogs to rescue their haul.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tanker driver Sludge must try and dodge disaster, Steve Graham suffers from his worst nightmare on the road and Macca McReady hits rough weather which throws him into jeopardy.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Graham finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery. Yogi runs out of road, and two concrete specialists head off the map and into trouble.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jonny Rayner faces an impossible choice - take on a crocodile infested river at 2am in the morning or wait until dawn and further delay his critical run.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jared and Johnnys epic mission grinds to a halt, Roscoe battles the elements on a world famous rally, and Turbo is flagged down by the boys in blue.

programme.title: The Patriot

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: The Glovers fight harsh winter conditions on the highway while low bedding their 45-ton winch machine to Erie Mountain. When winter slams Gollen, Craig steps up his exit strategy, but breakdowns and a collision on the block threaten to delay the job.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig and the crew are back at home, logging a local block called Badger. Kylee discovers Badgers logging road is no less treacherous than Gollen. Heavy snow buries Brents plan to haul logs off of one of his blocks.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig and the crew are back in camp to log Saddle Ridge, but the crew discover the block is chock-full of boulders, making it impossible to log. One of the Glovers winch machines spews thick white smoke. They receive bad news from the government.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.sub-title: Theres No Guarantee, but Theres Skill
programme.desc: With road restrictions and spring break-up on the horizon, $1 million worth of timber could be stranded unless Craig figures out a plan. Brent is behind on logging and clearing a campsite and avoids catastrophe while uprooting a giant tree.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An introduction to the gang. After Rachel leaves her Mr Potato Head look-alike fiance Barry at the altar, she moves in with Monica and discovers that independence sucks when you dont have Daddys credit cards to rely on. Meanwhile, Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to experience the advantages of bachelorhood, and Phoebe supports herself by playing guitar in the subway.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Rosss lesbian ex-wife is pregnant with his child and he doesnt like her choice of last name for the baby. Elsewhere, Rachel finds out that her ex-fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend whom everyone likes, Chandler is reunited with his beloved cigarettes, and Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Pip and Posy

programme.title: Cleasan Ataidh and Tilidh

programme.title: Sionnach agus Maigheach
programme.desc: Tusk is painting a portrait of Ping Wing. Well, hes trying to. Frustrated, he throws away his attempts.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Abair gu bheil Bleideag iarratach s Stella na manaidsear-sgìreil oirr. Stella finds herself appointed as Bleideags community manager, and it turns out that she is very demanding for such a small white rabbit.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an Ath-dhoras
programme.desc: Tha oidhche spà dol a bhith ann s tha Bhànrigh son sealltainn cho math s a tha spà. A spa night is going to take place and the Queen wants to show how fantastic a spa is.

programme.title: Dubhlain CBBC Alba
programme.desc: Calum Macdonald takes a look at some of the bonkers challenges attempted by the CBBC ALBA team, including some very smelly cheese tasting!

programme.title: Clann Na Cruinne
programme.desc: Although Vito is nervous about his first fight, his coach and grandmother encourage him greatly. He wears a t-shirt that his mother owned and his grandmother is certain this will secure a win.

programme.title: An La

programme.title: Cruit Phadruig
programme.desc: The time has come, and Peter is ready to buy some Highland cows. Là na Fèille ann agus tha Pàdruig deiseil airson crodh Gàidhealach a cheannach.

programme.title: Prosbaig
programme.desc: Donald Morrison looks back at some of the stories from the BBC Gaelic current affairs series.

programme.title: Oran na Mna

programme.title: Mach a Seo!
programme.desc: Ramsay immerses himself in Durnesss history, mainland Britains most north-westerly community.

programme.title: Rùm Gu Rùm, Le Erica

programme.title: Seirm

This episode features performances from Ciorstaidh Beaton, Eric Bibb, Loudon Wainwright III, Kíla and Joshua Burnside. In Gaelic with English subtitles.

programme.title: Na Lorgairean Aillse
programme.desc: An sgeulachd mu na daoine a rinn strì gus boireannaich a shàbhaladh bho aillse mhuineal na machlaige. The story of those who fought tirelessly to save women from cervical cancer.

programme.title: Elaine Paige: 60 Years on Stage
programme.desc: A celebration of Elaine Paiges 60-year career in show business.

programme.title: Elaine Paige Remembers... A Night on the Town
programme.desc: Elaine Paige looks back on A Night on the Town - a musical extravaganza from the early 1980s, filmed with a mostly American cast of singers and dancers, such as Ann Reinking, Hinton Battle, Frank Gorshin and the wonderful Eartha Kitt. Elaine recalls being drawn to the production as it featured so many songs from writers she most admires - Irving Berlin, Cole Porter and Noel Coward.

programme.title: A Night on the Town
programme.desc: Musical spectacular, first broadcast in 1983, showcasing the work of Irving Berlin, Noel Coward, George Gershwin and Cole Porter. Ann Reinking and Lewis Collins sing and dance their way through the bright lights of Berlin, London, New York, New Orleans and Paris, meeting Elaine Paige, Eartha Kitt and Frank Gorshin along the way. Alexander Faris Ambrosian conducts the BBC Concert Orchestra.

programme.title: Remembers.
programme.desc: Charles Dance looks back on the 1982 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens play.

programme.title: Ibsen
programme.desc: The 1982 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens psychological study of grief and guilt, starring Diana Rigg and Anthony Hopkins.

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: Mindfulness is the ability to be present with a clear, calm, curious mind. And feelings of joy can be triggered when this happens. How can watching penguins pinching pebbles, seeing antelope leaping in the air or looking at scenes of summer flowers help us to feel more positive emotionally? Mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe takes us on a global journey with imagery that will bring feelings of happiness and wellbeing to the viewer.

programme.title: Confessions of a Teenage Fraudster
programme.desc: A cautionary tale about one of the UKs most notorious credit card fraudsters, whose five-year crime wave began at just 16 years of age. While his contemporaries were using fake IDs to get into nightclubs, he was defrauding innocent cardholders from his desk in a call centre, laying the groundwork for a journey that would open up a world of wealth, first-class travel and an escape from the life he seemed destined for.

programme.desc: Khalil never remembers his dates names, so he calls them all baby girl to skirt around it. Obsessed with looking good, he checks himself out in the reflection of a spoon every 20 minutes on dinner dates.

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: After prison, Coventry musician Pa Salieu returns with renewed purpose and takes the stage at Glastonbury. While he fights to rebuild his career, can music save him again?

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Centre of the TARDIS
programme.desc: The TARDIS has crashed, Clara is lost inside, and the Doctor has 30 minutes before his ship explodes.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mikes neighbour spots a business opportunity which sparks all out war between them. The Captain makes a discovery and the Ghosts find a surprising new friend.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison reach boiling point over the BandB. Julian aims to prove he is more selfless than people think. A new addition triggers frightening flashbacks for Robin.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Series about an Irish matriarch, whose favourite pastime is meddling in the lives of her children.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: When their house is flooded, Agnes invites Winnie and Sharon to live with her while repairs are carried out. Meanwhile, she is asked do a eulogy and Buster has a secret to reveal.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: A not-so-clever plan to earn some extra cash backfires, bringing the lads head-to-head with Sergeant Healy, who has been hot on their heels for some time and is determined to catch them up to no good. They also may have been caught in the act by Principal Walshs two daughters, Siobhán and Linda, so the lads need to turn on the charm to persuade the girls not to spill the beans, which only serves to further irritate Principal Walsh.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jocks friendships with principal Walshs daughters Linda and Siobhan intensify, causing awkward tension between the lads, the principal, and the girls themselves. Conor and Jock crash a Walsh family barbecue, and principal Walshs wife Orla is intent on her husband giving the lads a chance: they cant be all that bad, can they?

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Theres only one thing left for Conor and Jock to do to get Linda and Siobhan to really fall for them: spend a whole day together on a beautiful adventure. A sick day from school is the only way they can do this, leading to various difficulties.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and his mum Maireads much-loved fridge, bought by Conors dad, has finally given up on them. A road trip to find a replacement and relive some memories brings about unexpected results for Conor, Jock, and Mairead.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Mairead is feeling the pinch financially, so the lads come up with an ill-advised plan to raise some money to help her out. Meanwhile, Mairead and Sergeant Healy are in two minds about taking their friendship to the next level.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jock plan to take a bus journey but not before Jock swipes some alcopops from an off-licence and is unsuccessfully pursued by a security guard. Local bully Billy Murphy, stumbles upon this and spots an opportunity to face his nemesis.

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Its Christmas week, and the residents of the estate where Conor, Jock and Mairead live have been fighting off an eviction from the council for over a month. The residents have created a barricade to show their determination that they wont be moved.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommys at rock bottom after the worst year of his life, but with his hand fixed, hes planning a comeback. Tensions mount, and things take an unexpected turn at the press conference.

programme.desc: When Hoofius plays his grandfauns old magical panpipes, his friends do exactly what he asks them to do, perfect for leading a quest, or so he thinks.

programme.title: Newsround

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty is busy with spring and planning ahead for summer. Hes doing a seed-sowing masterclass, cutting back Cornus and dividing ferns to put in the new Woodland Garden.

programme.title: All About Eve
programme.desc: Six Oscars went to this account of an ambitious actress who manipulates and connives her way to stardom. Margo employs Eve Harrington to shore up her fragile ego, but the starlet has other plans in mind.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. Who will be eliminated?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: With a budget of £450,000, a married couple looking to uproot from Greater Manchester seek the help of Jules Hudson to find a new family home close to the coast in glorious Dorset.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Mark Stacey and Nick Hall offer advice on all the antiques brought along to a valuation day in Folkestone. Paul Martin investigates the work of Pugin, a master of Victorian Gothic design, at the house he built in Ramsgate.

programme.title: The Ipcress File
programme.desc: Agent Harry Palmer is assigned to investigate a bizarre brain drain among scientists, and finds himself embroiled in a world of espionage where nobody can be trusted and nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Earths Great Rivers
programme.desc: The Mississippi, from frozen waterfalls to time travelling barges, from busy beavers to mysterious swamps, connects a continent like no other river on Earth.

programme.title: Super League Rugby LIVE
programme.desc: Action from round six of the Super League season as Leigh Leopards play Toulouse.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The friendship of reality TV stars Chris Hughes and Jake Quickenden is put under strain as they compete to make money from buying and selling antiques.

programme.title: Inside Britains National Parks
programme.desc: A look at the New Forest. Once a royal hunting ground for William the Conqueror, it is now a unique mosaic of open heathlands, ancient woodlands, coastline and picturesque villages.

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume3
programme.desc: Elaine Paige has another treasure trove of musical theatre moments from the BBC archives. Featuring numbers from Hello, Dolly!, Les Miserables, Chess, South Pacific and more.

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: Elaine Paige takes another toe tapping trip through the BBCs archives, rustling up the biggest show tunes from Britains best-loved musicals. From Les Mis to Joseph, Oklahoma! to Hamilton, theres something for everyone. Featuring stunning turns from some of the biggest names in the business, such as Dame Shirley Bassey, Alfie Boe, Hugh Jackman and Barbara Dickson, to a set of wonderful cast ensembles.

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC
programme.desc: This collection of hits from includes several of Elaine Paiges personal favourites from the BBCs song and dance archives, a some of the worlds best-loved musicals ranging from Cats and The Lion King to Funny Girl and My Fair Lady.

programme.title: ...Sings Musicals
programme.desc: A delve into the BBC archives for an eclectic mix of performances from musicals from the 60s to the present. Featuring the likes of Ella Fitzgerald singing `Mack the Knife from the Threepenny Opera, Captain Sensible performing a classic from South Pacific, Jeff Beck going down the yellow brick road of Oz, Jay Z taking on Annie, and all points in between.

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey searches for one suspect, whilst Frank Napier deals with another. As the evidence mounts and Carey is forced to avert another catastrophe, she begins to fear she might have made a terrible mistake. Not that Napier cares. Hes using his own unique brand of interrogation to test Careys theory. Piersons first day on the job gets ever more challenging, but as the net tightens for James Whitlock, it looks like SO15 might have made a breakthrough in the case.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: On the last day of the season, the hunters gather to target breeding females; Bill and Tes investigate a secluded stretch of islands; Dusty hopes to go out with a bang, while Zak and Bruce follow an ancient native trail.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Les hears about a hook up for truckloads of brand new goods and makes a move that could change the store forever.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson is joined by Debbie Serpell, Stewart Hofgartner, David Tupman and Karen Dalmeny in Gloucester. A lovely old-fashioned clock turns up on Karens table, Debbie comes face-to-face with a real bargain hunter and who would have thought that six spoons could cause such a reaction!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.sub-title: The First Fish is the Hardest
programme.desc: Its the opening week of a new North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and for the fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, the summer ahead promises the chance for big fortunes.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Every boat except one caught fish during the first week of Bluefin tuna season, so all eyes are on Captain Paul Herbert to land his first tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Its been a long standing fishing belief that practicing good karma on the ocean brings good in return, but not every captain plays by the rules and not every captain can benefit from them.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: As the hunting season heats up, Troy, Chase and Bill dive into deep water to catch pythons, but could be in over their heads.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Veteran swamper Bruce Mitchell and invasive species hunter Zak Catchem take on the legendary Skunk Ape Alley.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: The hunters venture into the Everglades Triangle, an area known for mysterious disappearances and swarms of snakes; Troy, Chase and Bill use a drone to search the swamp from the air, while Bruce and Zak track snakes with a handheld thermal device.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Counting down ten compelling UFO crashes that have been reported across the globe. From an acorn-shaped object that crashed in the woods of rural Pennsylvania, to a mysterious craft that washed ashore in Japan.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mutant Mermaid, UFOs vs. Nukes and Seamonster Chases a Boat
programme.desc: Scientists study claims of a dead mermaid discovered and preserved in Japan. Are UFOs attracted to our nuclear facilities and should we be worried? What is the glowing-eyed sea creature captured on video chasing a motorboat?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Alien Sabotage, Ghost Child and Hungry Hungry Sasquatch
programme.desc: Does a home security video show proof that UFOs are messing with our technology? Did a species of carnivorous marsupials thought to be long extinct just get caught on camera? Did a visitor at a historic cemetery in Savannah capture a ghost child?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Footprint casts may be proof that a massive, undiscovered primate lives in North America.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Satellites orbiting our planet have put more eyes on Earths vast, unexplored areas of land and sea - revealing baffling new anomalies.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Modern imaging technology and analysis from military and intelligence professionals, as well as leading scientists, investigate mysteries from strange geological occurrences to odd man-made structures as seen by more than 4,000 orbiting satellites.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Modern imaging technology and analysis from military and intelligence professionals, as well as leading scientists, investigate mysteries from strange geological occurrences to odd man-made structures as seen by more than 4,000 orbiting satellites.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Its the only unsolved air piracy case in history. In 1971, a man hijacks a Northwest Orient Airlines flight, demanding four parachutes and $200,000. He jumps out of the plane with the money and is never seen again.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Its one of the most famous prehistoric monuments on Earth -- a mysterious arrangement of stones that have adorned the English countryside for millennia. But to this day, nobody knows how the landmark was built or why.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: After seizing power in 1933, Adolf Hitler began systematically transforming a peaceful German population into a ruthless war machine. Experts investigate the innovative methods used by the Nazis to indoctrinate and control the will of its citizens.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Its one of lifes most confounding mysteries: What happens to us after we die? From heaven and hell to resurrection and reincarnation, well explore the remarkable possibilities of life after death.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A journey to some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded, from collapsed salt mines, to bizarre rituals and lost cities.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Even after centuries of study, the human mind remains as inscrutable as ever. Take a look if the quintessential human machine, the brain, be even more powerful than humans realise.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: A look at how some people live through the impossible, such as plane crashes, freezing temperatures, or performing superhuman feats while in danger. These remarkable tales of survival force others to reconsider what is known about the will to live.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Could historys most powerful men know more about extra-terrestrials than us? Experts explore the complex relationship between presidents and aliens.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt, a civilization millennia ahead of its time, may have had extraterrestrial help in building its masterpieces.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: Ufologists discuss what UFOs may be, where they may originate and what may be their agenda.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: NASA denies UFO accounts and takes measures to prevent astronauts from telling their stories.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Two men attempt a carjacking at a car wash; a hapless teenage driver turns a parking lot into a demolition derby and more.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Seths Secret: Les feels hurt when he finds out that Seth is at a rival pawn shop and fears that he is quitting American Jewelry to join the competition.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Breakdown At Tiffanys: A man brings in a 160-year-old Tiffany watch. But with no official markings on it, will Les be tempted by his $40,000 asking price?

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Harolds Gamble: Les offers to buy a diamond-encrusted Audemars Piguet watch from a customer but asks his watch expert take a closer look at it first.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly: Henrys Wreck-Trospective
programme.desc: Motoring maverick Henry Cole goes through over a decades worth of footage, featuring oily chaos, revisiting the best barn finds, examining the worst breakdowns and biggest rebuilds.

programme.desc: Motoring maverick Henry Cole goes through over a decades worth of footage, featuring oily chaos, revisiting the best barn finds, examining the worst breakdowns and biggest rebuilds.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and top restorers Allen Millyard and Guy Willison scour the country, challenging themselves to make money out of buying and selling other peoples automotive junk and classic collectibles.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: The classic Fiat 500 is too expensive, so the team decide to look for a Fiat 126. Will and Gus hunt for neglected cars that they can fix and flip for a profit, but any losses will come out of their own pockets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WWII. A Godfather video display illuminates the pawn shop. A Johnny Drama whiskey bottle tries to join Chums entourage.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Rick takes a swing at a Honus Wagner baseball card, will it be the real deal? Then, Chum strums a custom Fender by popular guitar maker John Carruthers. Meanwhile, Rick is thrilled to see a Draped Bust half dollar hit the counter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didnt want and have to sort through but they uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen gets nostalgic and the guys find a set of RC race boats and when they buy a man-cave unit full of old whiskey, a night of partying leads to some tough sales.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to Mission hills for a 2-unit auction. They go all in for an electric car, a home brewing system, and high-end rifles. Will they take big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The guys land a custom drift car and a luxury antiques unit that could have a one-of-a-kind pilot pistol from WWI. Plus, Ton gets into trouble at a car sale.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: The guys head to the Wild West but can they strike gold at auction? The powder gun looks like it will hit the target, but are they heading off track with the train sets?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Renes superstitious attitude could prove to be a hindrance, Ivy trusts his gut, Jarrod and Brandi manage to get the last laugh on their rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy hunts for high-end items in Moreno Valley; Jarrod reveals his alter ego to Brandi; Darrell flies solo; Rene has a close encounter with death.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Casey attempts to keep a rein on Renes spending habits, Darrell and Brandon use their intuition to soar above their competitors, Ivy tries to secretly learn Jarrod and Brandis purchasing strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon need to secure merchandise for their web site, an exhausted Ivy switches into robot mode, Rene dresses for success, Jarrod and Brandi try a new strategy.

programme.desc: The team puts notorious phenomenon-experiencer Chris Bledsoe to the test, from the swamps of the Florida Everglades to the controlled labs of Virginias Monroe Institute to answer the question of how Bledsoes unique brain is able to communicate?

programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a puzzling find may lead them one step closer to a privateers long-lost treasure.

programme.desc: An Oregon woman doing some work on a remote cabin is spied on by a dark figure. Next, a man in Arkansas encounters something terrifying in the woods.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge gets a job at Homers work, Mr Burns falls madly in love with her. He invites Marge over for an intimate dinner for two, complete with a kidnapped Tom Jones to serenade them.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer gets kicked out of an all-you-can-eat seafood restaurant for eating too much, he takes the owner to court. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week begins at The Peniarth Arms in Wales, with host Susanne. Toby and Kath feel theyve been transported in time, while Ryan and Sarah kick up a fuss about their room.

programme.desc: When Robert is put in charge of selecting his wedding invitations, Ray suggests he intentionally botch the assignment so that Amy will let him off the hook with their wedding plans.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond is horrified when he thinks his `cookie nemesis flirted with him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets annoyed with Ray when he seems pleased that shes picked one of her attractive friends to replace her if she dies.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gives a bridal shower for Amy, but her good intentions get sidetracked by Maries overzealous participation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra wind up in a two-week standoff over a suitcase.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie give Raymond a guilt trip when they find out that the bachelor party he hosted for Robert was a huge disappointment.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Peter attempts to bury the hatchet between himself, Robert and Ray, Robert suspects hes up to no good and assigns Ray to keep an eye on him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Amy exchange vows in a wedding ceremony that has the Barone family tradition written all over it.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra convinces Ray to let her join him on the golf course after she once again realises that they dont have fun together anymore.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Michael stays home from school for two days in a row, Ray suspects he simply has homework he hasnt finished.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie instantly tries to get the upper hand in her relationship with her new daughter-in-law when Amy and Robert return from their honeymoon.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray are annoyed at the over-the-top affection Robert and Amy are expressing towards each other.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra persuades Ray to hire Gianni to do some DIY work in their kitchen, but they both soon regret it due to their friends laziness.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After Amy invites her brother Peter to stay for dinner, he makes himself at home on the couch and never leaves.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tells Marie a little white lie that snowballs out of control.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Features music from multi award-winning rap superstar Tinie Tempah and an acrobatic performance from the Peres Brothers Group. Plus, one unsuspecting member of the public gets the surprise of their life when they become the unexpected star of the show.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: In an effort to restore normality to their friendship, Rachel tells Joey a big lie about her unborn child. Meanwhile, Phoebes tea leaves reveal that she will soon encounter the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe brings her annoyingly upbeat boyfriend to Mr and Mrs Gellers 35th wedding anniversary party. Meanwhile, Ross is astounded when his parents ask him and the pregnant Rachel to pretend to be married, in order to avoid a potential scandal.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a `Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle. He is reluctant to let the magazine do a profile of him, but Rachel tries to persuade him to reconsider so that he can mention her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics when she realises how unprepared she is to care for an infant. She reluctantly agrees to allow her frustrating mother Sandra to move in to help her, upsetting Ross. Meanwhile, Monica tries to atone for forgetting to invite Sandra to the baby shower, and Chandler and Ross exhaust themselves by repeatedly playing a confusing game called Bamboozle to help Joey prepare to audition as a game show host.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Cooking Class
programme.desc: When Monicas cooking at the restaurant receives a harsh write-up in a newspaper, she goes to a criticism class taught by the reviewer, hoping to convince him to reconsider his opinion. Meanwhile, Rachel gets upset when a cute salesgirl flirts with Ross while he and Rachel are shopping for baby supplies, and nervous about a major job interview, Chandler receives some questionable coaching from Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: When Rachels pregnancy goes beyond the expected delivery date, the pain makes her increasingly irritable and willing to try anything that might speed up the babys arrival. Meanwhile, Monica and Phoebe bet on the date of the birth, while Joey can only take one guest to the premiere of his film, and chooses Chandler. Unfortunately, Chandler falls asleep during the screening.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward with an anxious Ross, but to her dismay she is put in a semi-private room and then, the heavily pregnant Janice, is allocated to share the room with her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward with an anxious Ross. Numerous other pregnant women are wheeled off to give birth while Rachels painful labour continues. Elsewhere in the hospital, Phoebe is attracted to a handsome patient, Cliff, and asks Joey to pose as Dr Drake Ramoray to interrogate Cliff about his background.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Due to a misunderstanding, Rachel finds herself engaged to Joey instead of Ross shortly after giving birth to her and Rosss baby girl. Meanwhile, Joey cant help taking a look as Rachel tries unsuccessfully to nurse her baby. Inspired to have a baby of their own, Monica and Chandler retire to a hospital cupboard for a little privacy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joeys futile attempts to gain Rosss forgiveness for mistakenly asking Rachel to marry him only result in emergency hospitalisation. Meanwhile, an exhausted Rachel desperately searches for a solution to end baby Emmas non-stop crying.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartmans racist ways lead him to weave some unexpected, cupid style, magic. Meanwhile, Kyle is less than happy with what the rumour mill has to say about him.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy is so enraged by South Park Elementary changing the rules of American Football he sarcastically suggests more changes, and Butters creates a sports drink.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: As Cartman finally admits that he is yet another statistic regarding obese children in America he purchases a mobility scooter insisting that it is his right to drive around on it. programme.desc: The guys compete head-to-head posing odd TV shows to the public, and do what they are told at a department store. Tonights punishment involves a fundraising event at an Arts Theatre.

programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler And Monicas Wedding - Part 1
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler prepare for their wedding. Meanwhile, Joey is starring in a movie with a prestigious actor with a spitting problem.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler And Monicas Wedding - Part 2
programme.desc: Joey encounters problems trying to get off the movie set to officiate the wedding when the star turns up drunk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandlers wedding reception is almost upstaged by the news that someone might be pregnant. Meanwhile, Ross tries to impress a pretty single woman, Chandler has troubles on the dance floor, and Joey hopes to impress Chandlers mums date - an important Broadway producer - with his acting ability.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Red Sweater
programme.desc: The girls speculate as to whos the father of Rachels baby, the guys scramble after Chandler loses the film from his wedding, and Monica wants to open the wedding gifts.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everybody seems to know who the father of Rachels baby is except the man himself. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Joey lie about a gas leak to get into Monica and Chandlers apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachels attempt to explain how they wound up in bed together quickly descends into an argument over who seduced who, until Ross shocks the room by announcing that he has the whole encounter on video. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler return from their honeymoon, excited at the prospect of socialising with another just-married couple they met on the flight home.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross gets upset when Rachel goes out on a date with a handsome actor, Phoebe tries to prevent a chef from being sacked, and Chandler kills a co-workers promotion.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Halloween Party
programme.desc: At Monicas Halloween party, Phoebe meets the friendly fiance of her flighty twin Ursula, but becomes alarmed when she learns that her sister has misrepresented herself to her trusting future in-law.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross learns that a pregnant Rachel wants to move out and find a place of her own, so he suggests a vacancy in his building. Then he learns that the elderly occupant is not quite dead yet. Meanwhile, Phoebe is ecstatic when Eric dumps her twin sister Ursula and chooses her instead, and Monica comes unhinged when she suspects that her new maid is stealing her jeans, among other things.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for denying Chandler a bachelor party, Monica hires a stripper to perform for him, without learning that shes a prostitute. Elsewhere, Rachels father learns about her pregnancy and plans to give Ross a piece of his mind.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An old high-school friend of Monicas is invited to the Thanksgiving dinner with the gang, but Monica is unaware that he isnt exactly fond of Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe pretend to be mesmerised by American football in order to avoid helping Monica in the kitchen, and Joey vows to devour the entire turkey single-handedly.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is aghast when Monica buys painfully expensive boots, and Phoebe tries to capitalise on her discovery that Ross son attends school with the son of rock star Sting.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross Step Forward
programme.desc: Ross new girlfriend wants to put their photograph on Christmas cards, Rachel eyes Joey as a possible romantic partner, and the newlyweds cope with Chandlers boss as he goes through a divorce.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
programme.desc: To prepare Joey for his big date the following night, Rachel eagerly agrees to go out with him for a rare night on the town. However, when each is pleasantly surprised with their newfound compatibility, they begin to regard each other in a way that no one could have predicted.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: As Joey agonises over his secret affection for Rachel, Monica mistakenly thinks that he is infatuated with Phoebe. Meanwhile, Ross and Rachel promise not to try to find out the sex of their unborn child, but Rachel cant resist having a peek inside the doctors confidential folder. Also, Monica urges a reluctant Chandler to enjoy the soothing pleasures of a scented bath, but realises that shes created a tub monster.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey rushes pregnant Rachel to hospital when she experiences pains. When Ross feels left out, Joey makes a gallant suggestion. Meanwhile, Chandler is surprised to discover what is behind the locked door of Monicas secret cupboard, and Phoebe gets the impression that Monica is enjoying one of her massages a little too much.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birthing Video
programme.desc: Monica prepares for a sexy Valentines Day, but Chandler is too shell-shocked after accidentally viewing Rachels birthing video. Meanwhile, Phoebe gives Joey the worlds most cheerful dog.

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross, while Chandler becomes nervous when Phoebes handsome new boyfriend Don shares numerous personality traits with Monica.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Airing from 2005 to 2009 on NBC, the game show series returns to primetime TV with original host Howie Mandel. A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Five million-dollar cases are on the board as a woman seven months pregnant plays to win cash.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Jess and Phil are joined by The Ghost Brothers as they continue their investigation of the mysteries of Mackinac Island. The teams explore a lighthouse with a dark past and realise the troubled past of the island is more widespread than they thought.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Jess and Phil head to England in search of a legendary monstrous beast thats said to stalk the wilderness. After an unforgettable and truly historic encounter, they realise the creature is more than a myth.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Jess and Phil dive into the mysteries of Niagara Falls. The popular honeymoon destination is also the site of a deluge of horrors. The team investigates reports of disturbing paranormal activity and the Falls famous history of violent deaths.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Japans 2011 Fukushima nuclear disaster, citizens began reporting something truly amazing: UFOs. Phil and Jess enter a radioactive wasteland to discover the stunning truth behind these extraterrestrial encounters.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Heather investigate the worlds most iconic cryptid, the elusive Loch Ness Monster. Actor and monster hunter Rhys Darby joins them as they journey deep into the Scottish wilds. They explore new evidence beneath Loch Ness murky waters.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Heather journey into the Florida Everglades on the hunt for the Skunk Ape, a bloodthirsty cryptid said to be menacing in both size and stench. The team heads deep into the swamps before having an unforgettable encounter.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: With pressure mounting after a disastrous first Forever Claim barge and the prospect of losing Float Camp, Jared brings in more crew -- including a gamble on a new Fat Truck driver -- to boost production.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: After the loader fire, Jared faces a new reality: wildfire threat. Adrian is tasked with reviving a rusted firetruck, while fallers fall high-dollar timber. But when road damage shuts down their main haul route, the operation grinds to a halt.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Fire season shutdown is imminent and Jareds crew races to fulfil a barge of the summer. Chainsaws spark fires, and when a blaze hits the Forever Claim, Jared must make a call whether to end the season early.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: The fate of a rookie mountain miner lies in the balance after he sinks his life savings into a British Columbia placer claim. With fine gold proving tricky to capture, Freddy and Juan must develop all-new ideas to boost recovery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan face a failing gold mine in the Arizona Desert, run by a nephew and his uncle living on the claim. With their money exhausted, the guys devise an ingenious cost-cutting system with their first-ever solar-powered operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan rescue a British Columbia miner on his final season without a miracle; their search for new ground leads to shocking results.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Matt tackles a hoard packed with high-value vintage toys and hidden loaded guns. Matt test-drives a 1960s British sports car and test-fires the weapons at a local gun range. Lowball bids force the team to find new buyers.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes. With a budget of $40,000 and six weeks to finish the project, will they be able to turn it into the perfect family retreat?

programme.title: Ed Staffords Rite of Passage
programme.desc: For most people, Shaolin kung fu takes years to master - Ed has just a few days to learn to control his Qi, or vital force, before fighting a martial arts master.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. A team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this stretch of water.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Adventurer Josh Gates, scientist Phil Torres, and paranormal researcher Jessica Chobot investigate reports of supernatural encounters, mysterious creatures, and extraterrestrial phenomena.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: When Mark and Hucks shine stash vanishes, the hunt for culprits sparks explosive plans for revenge.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: When Josh finally completes his decade-long bunker project, he fires up the still for a first-ever run of gold flake cinnamon shine. Mark and Digger deliver some backwoods justice to an unscrupulous man selling industrial alcohol as pot still liquor.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds one of only 1,000 MC40s ever made, the 40th anniversary homage to the Monte Carlo rally-winning British icon. Ant must tackle this challenge head one to revive it to its original look.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike hunts down an early SUV, a 1970 International Harvester Scout 800A. Ants repair includes rebuilding a leaky transfer case and replacing the interior to restore it to its former glory.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant answer questions from fans all around the globe. In the process, they reveal to their fans the inner workings of the series and look back at the last eight cars and what they have achieved.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike finds a rare beast, a 1976 Mercury Capri MK2 with the classic 2.8 litre V6. However, its not without its problems which means a lot of work for Ant.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The pinnacle of BMW is the modern classic, the E46 M3. Mike finds one with the subframe already fixed, and he challenges Ant to transform the transmission with new tech.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The Volvo Amazon 122 a classic Swedish auto with true rally heritage. Mike travels to the Pacific Northwest, where he has tracked down a true barn find. Ant is tasked to make it road worthy before the boys know the true scope of the work ahead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: With just three days to preserve the legacy of a fourth-generation Alaskan homesteading family, the Raneys must fix an earthquake-ravaged foundation and revive a dormant garden before hitting the lower 48 for another year of incredible rescues.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys enter the shadow of Mount Denali to tackle their first-ever dual homestead rescue. Marty, Misty and Matt race against the clock to address food, water and shelter concerns that could ensure both homesteads survive the next brutal winter.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A recently divorced single mother finds herself unprepared for winter in interior Alaska. Facing late summer wildfires, the Raneys embrace 22 hours of daylight to battle still-frozen ground to secure water and food stores to survive the winter.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: As the Raneys scramble to ready their 40-acre homestead for winter, Marty gets an urgent SOS call from a fellow Alaskan. A tragic plane crash has destroyed access to his homestead across a treacherous river, and hes dangerously unprepared.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Tim goes full outlaw in the Bluegrass State only to uncover the dark side of working with a Kentucky shine boss.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller

programme.sub-title: Saving More Than Logs in Bulls Gap, TN

programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead work together to give new life to run-down classic automobiles to resell them at a profit. Working on a tight budget, Mike must find a vehicle for Ant to fix, but that isnt always the easiest task.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are torn over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off, spelling disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Comedians Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson take on breakfast pastries, matcha and yuzu biscuits, and the weirdest places theyve ever slept, in cake form!

programme.title: Toy Story
programme.desc: A childs toys come alive whenever he leaves the room. Woody is a pull-string cowboy and is respected by the other toys as their leader and the boys number-one toy. He soon finds his authority usurped, however, by the arrival of an impressive astronaut figure who goes by the name of Buzz Lightyear.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family recall the story of when Lisa got her saxophone. It all started when Bart was having trouble at school and had to see the school psychologist.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart struggles as the quarterback of Homers peewee football team and gets some advice from Joe Namath.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After witnessing a riot, Homer decides to buy a gun and after taking possession of the weapon, he demonstrates how to use it in a shockingly irresponsible way. Marge and Lisa are horrified, so to convince them that guns are great Homer takes the family to an NRA meeting, where he becomes a lifetime member. Marge is still really angry, so Homer agrees to get rid of the gun, but later Bart and Milhouse find it in the fridge.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: The celebrity Goggleboxers are all set for this weeks top TV. Including Martin and Roman Kemp, Chris McCausland and Donna Preston. And Bobby, Jeff and Freddie Brazier.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fred and his team welcome more enthusiastic singletons to the First Dates restaurant. Self-confessed nerd and Star Wars fan Lachlan and supermarket worker Luke both return to try their luck with their new dates, Becca and Shannon.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nanny Jo, who always knew she was bisexual, embarks on her first ever date with a woman. Another hopeful singleton is 29-year-old Dean, who meets a flame-haired estate agent Kate, once voted the ugliest girl in her year.

programme.title: My Heart Cant Beat Unless You Tell It To
programme.desc: Two mysterious siblings find themselves at odds over care for their frail and sickly younger brother.

programme.title: Significant Other
programme.desc: A young couple take a remote backpacking trip through the Pacific Northwest and face sinister events.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Ghost and Mrs Muir
programme.desc: Anna, a recent widow, moves out of her in-laws home to a haunted English cottage where she falls in love with the ghost of a 19th-century sea captain that once lived there.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Young DJ and his pals set out to discover what bloodcurdling secrets lie behind the front door of the scary house across the street. When the house comes alive and starts eating people, have the kids bitten off more than they can chew?

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: A belt of radiation goes out of control and threatens to melt the Earth, leaving Admiral Nelson and his prototype nuclear submarine to salvage the situation.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: A cabaret singer witnesses a murder and goes undercover as a nun. In the convent, she is put in charge of coaching the choir, which she transforms into a toe-tapping rhythm group. As a result, the churchs congregation swells until even the Pope comes to witness pop classics such as `My Guy performed to glorify the Lord, but of course, her fame gives away her hiding place to the killer.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: The secretive Men in Black are agents charged with regulating the aliens who have settled on Earth and ensure that they remain undetected. New recruit J and his partner K must find and stop an intergalactic terrorist bent on assassinating two ambassadors from opposing galaxies before they can make peace.

programme.title: The Green Mile
programme.desc: Paul Edgecomb, the head guard of death row, just wants life for him, his colleagues and the condemned to be nice and easy. However, when Michael Clarke Duncan, a man-mountain convicted of murdering two little white girls arrives, things start to get strange. How can he cure Edgecombs urinary infection with a touch, bring a dead pet mouse back to life and cure the wardens wifes cancer? Is he innocent?

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: In a remote roadside diner in the Mojave desert, several locals including owner Bob Hanson, his son Jeep and pregnant waitress Charlie, begin to notice that something very unusual is going on. With no TV signal, all telecommunications failing, and an enormous dust cloud massing in the direction of LA, they begin to suspect a terrorist attack, but nothing can prepare them for the truth.

programme.desc: A Bronx-bred pizza maker brings Neapolitan-style pies to northern California, in Queens, N.Y., a filmmaker turned chef makes spicy atomic fireballs, in New Yorks Lower East Side, seasonal sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Eateries in Key West, FL, include a little shack serving up New England seafood, standout fish tacos, a tiny food cart serving Asian-Caribbean fusion dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Waipahu, lechon special and pork adobo fried rice, in Kailua, red curry fish and Mandarin duck confit, in Kaneohe, pan-fried ono and ahi cakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Portland, Ore., a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house, in San Carlos, Calif., a neighborhood spot featuring burgers, cheese steaks and signature sandwiches.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Sweet and savoury, this is fruit all the way, and anything goes. Ina is pushing the fruit boundaries by shaking up the classics, and getting the scoop on fruit dessert.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Inspired by a recent trip to Florence, Ina is re-creating a fabulous Florentine feast for friends back home in East Hampton. First, theres a mozzarella master class with a local cheese maker.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Inas got vegetable ideas for every day of the week, when youre stuck in a vegetable rut. There are fantastic main courses, starters, salads and sides.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Dinner on day one of Ina and Jeffreys California trip is chicken with wild mushrooms and green salad. The fun continues with an invitation to cook baked goat cheese at Sinskeys vineyard.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: This is all about what professional cooks make at home. Fantastic quick and easy recipes and top tips from the chefs and cooks in the know, for us to try at home.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares a collection of restaurant-inspired dishes to cook at home. Ina cooks with Grand Pellegrino for the famous Raos restaurant and finds out the best kitchens in America.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks up some versatile meatball kebabs, delicious crispy pork noodles with sticky ginger and garlic, a magnificent carrot puff pastry and a humble crumble, all for under a quid per portion.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie makes sticky toffee pudding with his mum Sally. He also rustles up the perfect steak and onion sandwich, and cooks an Italian classic - osso buco with saffron risotto.

programme.title: Jamies Comfort Food
programme.desc: Jamie takes on three comfort food classics. First up is a retro treat: chicken Kiev. He also cooks spaghetti vongole with a non-traditional pink twist, and creates a deluxe shepherds pie - made with slow-roasted lamb shoulder instead of mince.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James and his wingman, top chef Mark Jordan, hop aboard their motorbikes to discover the wonderful island of Guernsey. They sample local speciality Gache cake, a seafood platter fit for a king, and James uses Guernseys wonderful dairy produce to make a delicious creamy rice pudding with chargrilled peaches. Finally, James and Mark set themselves a fishing challenge by attempting to catch the King of the Sea: the mighty turbot.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James discovers the delights of Dorset. He is joined on his trip by his mate and Michelin-starred chef Paul Ainsworth. They hop aboard a millionaires yacht, where James cooks a delicious sea bass dish. Paul discovers some fantastic local cheese, while James visits a breeder with mangalista pigs in a beautiful coastline setting. The highlight of their day is a beachside barbecue, where they feast on some amazing pork and chicken cooked al fresco.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Its a trip back in time for Si as the Bikers cook dishes from his home county, Northumberland. This means a celebration of local seafood, a traditional lamb recipe and a new way of serving his favourite ice-cream.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Bikers cook dishes to feed body and soul, including some of their favourite recipes which are both healthy and delicious. Theres a wholesome warming soup, a chic healthy pudding and even a low fat version of burger and fries.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Bikers have a fresh take on pub grub with a new look for a traditional pudding, their take on the North-Easts mighty chicken Parmo and reveal the secrets behind their ultimate fishcake.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: The Bikers start their adventure in south Wales, hunting for unique ingredients to include on the menu of a family restaurant that has its eyes on winning a Michelin star.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams culinary crusade takes him on a road trip along the beautiful Gulf Coast in search of delicious eats. Adam begins his journey at The Shed in Ocean Springs, Mississippi.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans tasty travels have brought him to the Florida Keys, an archipelago at the southernmost tip of the continental United States. The Florida Keys is the fishing capital of the world.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, Adam tries Aberdeen Angus at one of the citys finest steak restaurants. Later, he checks out meat pies from an award-winning local butcher.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Britain
programme.desc: In the Peak District, Adam learns more about the accidental invention of Bakewell pudding. Then, he visits a gastropub for his first taste of local grouse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Fieris on a tasty tour of the Southeast, starting with an out-of-bounds brisket poboy in Port Allen, LA. Then, Guy finds scrumptious shrimp rolls in Gainesville, FL, and a Korean-Mexican mashup in Atlanta is rocking big-time bulgogi cheesesteaks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Fieris diving into barbecue fusion and more! Texas meets Ethiopia at a Dallas-area joint with big-time brisket injera nachos. A Naples, FL, spot has a gluten-free twist on beignets, and an Atlanta chef is serving up craveable carnitas and barbacoa.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris digging cheffed-up eats of all kinds! A DDD alum is sourcing local Decatur, GA, ingredients for coffee-dusted venison, a joint in Texas is topping their bagels with basil schmears.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieris getting into the funkiest of flavours! In Atlanta, two pals are serving up prime-time patty melt empanadas. Theres a bakery in Los Angeles plating craveable khachapuri.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Pork hash with black beans; authentic homemade pastas; smoked barbecue chicken; speciality hot dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Octopus tacos; stuffed fish with lobster sauce; taquitos; sushi with a Mexican flair.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: The pursuit of Americas greatest chow-downs has led Adam Richman to Omaha, Nebraska. Adam begins his culinary journey by trying the famous Godfather sandwich at Amatos Cafe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans eating exploration has led him to Charlotte, the queen city of North Carolina, and he is on a quest to taste some of the citys signature spreads.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: A pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken. A four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston for epic low country chow. He takes on the Belt Buster Challenge, in which he must consume a 1 kg burger, 1.4 kg of nachos, tater tots, and a 340 ml milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams tour of the taste buds takes him to Rochester, New York. Before he hits the streets, he makes a quick detour to catch a NASCAR race at Watkins Glen International.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans search for iconic chow-down joints has led him to the beautiful island of Oahu. Adams first stop is Hanks Haute Dogs, where hell try a Chicago-style frank with an Hawaiian twist.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans quest for the countrys best food joints has led him to Jackson for a true taste of the South. His first stop is at Chimneyville Smokehouse, an old train depot in the heart of Jackson.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: A 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits Sleepy Hollow, where he tries the massive Headless Horseman Burger and takes on the Dawg House Challenge, in which a roll of the dice chooses 12 insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by top TV chef Monica Galetti. Theyre in Oxford, where Monica discovers the delights of an organic local distiller. James takes a river trip to a fantastic pick your own farm where he picks some raspberries and he uses them to cook a delicious pudding on the banks of the river. James also visits one of the worlds best chefs, Raymond Blanc, at his restaurant Le Manoir aux QuatSaisons, where he enjoys some of Raymonds Michelin-starred dishes.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is in South Wales, accompanied by Michelin-starred chef Stephen Terry. James discovers award-winning Welsh wine and cooks a Welsh lamb ragu on a beautiful mountainside. He samples the delights of organic Welsh chocolate and visits cooking legend Shaun Hill at his renowned restaurant The Walnut Tree. The day comes to an end at Barry Island, where James and Stephen enjoy all the fairground rides at this famous resort and James cooks Barry Island churros overlooking the beach.

programme.desc: Welcome the weekend as we celebrate the countrys triumphs in the Best of British feature, and look at the good news where you are.
