programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs battle to get their starter course to the Abbey Road banquet and dont disappoint with stunning dishes dedicated to everything from Tom Jones to Grime. The rivals are cooking to impress food writer Matthew Fort, restaurateur Oliver Peyton, broadcaster and cook Andi Oliver, plus guest judge and British music legend Martin Kemp.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the finest chefs in the UK compete to cook a fish course worthy of serving at a banquet celebrating the brilliance of British popular music, held at Abbey Road Studios. Along with the shows panel of expert judges, the rivals need to impress guest judge Kanya King.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The eight regional champions will compete to get their main courses onto the final menu of the banquet at Abbey Road Studios.They will be cooking for the judges food critic, Mathew Fort, cook and broadcaster Andi Oliver and restaurateur, Oliver Peyton plus guest judge, former Wham! star, Andrew Ridgeley. As ever, the judges will be looking for dishes laced with star quality and a good sprinkling of rock and roll wow factor worth of a banquet full of the music industrys finest.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the countrys finest chefs compete over the final place cooking at a banquet celebrating the brilliance of British popular music, held at Abbey Road studios. Each rival will need to cook a dessert to impress a panel of expert judges, along with guest judge Peter Hook, Joy Division and New Order bassist, and pioneer of Britains Madchester scene.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs must cook in an unfamiliar kitchen and scale up their dishes to provide the highest calibre of dining for a full banquet room of diners. Their guests are celebrities and unsung heroes who have helped create British musics unparalleled global reputation.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the nations greatest chefs battle for the chance to cook a glittering Olympic banquet. The feast will honour the hopes and achievements of the countrys sporting heroes, and it will be a glorious celebration of Britains culinary talents. This time it is the battle of the Scottish chefs - returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway must cook their fish course, but which one will prevail? Will it be grilled mackerel with beetroot meringues and horseradish ice cream, crab `cannelloni or poached halibut with squid ink? Great British Menu veteran Jeremy Lee will decide who goes through to the judges.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Sir Matthew Pinsent takes time out to meet one of the chefs and give them valuable tips on competing at the highest level. All three chefs are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. This is the big one, the main course, but which one will get top marks? Will it be barbecued veal with macaroni cheese, spinach and watercress; beef rump and terrine; or loin of blackface lamb with sweetbreads?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Scottish chefs - returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway. All of them are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. This is the final chance to impress `Great British Menu veteran Jeremy Lee with their dessert dishes - `Going for Gold, modern day Eton mess, and beetroot cake with chocolate mousse and fennel ice cream.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is decision time for the chefs from Scotland. The two remaining chefs cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton. The judges arent easily pleased and only world class cooking will do. Only one chef can make it through to the national finals to represent Scotland. If they win, one of their dishes could be on the menu at The Olympic Feast.

programme.title: World War II in Colour

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the final episode Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of the Tudor age, a time that saw momentous changes across all aspects of British life. Along the way Alice visits excavations at Shakespeares first theatre in Londons Shoreditch, where the Bard began his career and `Romeo and Juliet was first performed. Alice also joins a team sifting through Shakespeares rubbish at his last home in Stratford-Upon-Avon.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Quest To Find The Tomb Of Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: Mary Magdalene played a pivotal role in early Christianity and witnessed the execution and resurrection of Jesus Christ. Experts investigate the truth behind her mysterious disappearance and embark on a quest to locate her undiscovered remains.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Built by William the Conqueror, the Tower of London is one of Britains most iconic landmarks. It has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution, a silent witness to some of the most momentous events in our history. Dan Jones reveals some of its fascinating secrets and tells the stories of the traitors, rebels and royalty who met their end inside its imposing walls.

programme.desc: Martin looks round a pretty cottage with outbuildings with huge potential in Burton upon Trent, while Lucy checks out a flat in Londons Crystal Palace and Dion is in Mossley near Manchester in a four-bedroom bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin tackles the issue of solar panels on a property in Mountain Ash in Wales and wonders if itll be a sunny outcome for the new owner, while Lucy looks round a barn in Elstree in Hertfordshire and Dion visits a flat in Newport in Shropshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets a couple who buy a former millworkers cottage in Derbyshire as their first home together; Lucy Alexander meets a father and daughter team who are seasoned developers buying a house in Kent; and Dion Dublin talks to a man who, along with two friends, has clubbed together to buy an investment property in Lowestoft in Suffolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Walsall in the Midlands looking around a 1950s semi; Martin Roberts meets a man developing a ground-floor one-bedroom flat in Ilford in Essex; and Lucy Alexander catches up on a multi-million-pound redevelopment in East Horsley in Surrey where one small cottage with a big garden is converted into eight separate properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house with a bathroom layout challenge in Ripley, Derbyshire, a huge three-storey house with its freehold on offer in Erdington, Birmingham, and a mid-terrace house in Londons East Ham in need of a major makeover are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Lincolnshire looking round a pair of rural semi-detached cottages which the new owner may convert into one home. Martin Roberts is in Cheshire at a bungalow with bags of potential, and Lucy Alexander is in Kent talking to friends embarking on their first project together.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house in Chesterton in Staffordshire has a smelly problem and needs a total overhaul. The new owner of a semi in Bestwood in Nottingham also has a lot to do, while the new owner of a flat in Strawberry Hill has less than a week to sort out her auction buy before she jets off to Germany.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A husband and wife duo add their design skills to a house in Croydon in Surrey, while a seasoned developer creates a high-end house in multiple occupation in Coventry and a first time developer also does a great job with a house full of period features in Nutall in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets one of two young brothers busy building a property portfolio in Bolsover, Derbyshire, while Dion Dublin checks out a three-bedroom semi in Wolverhampton, and Lucy Alexander is impressed by plans to convert a two-bedroom, fire-damaged terraced house in Londons Plaistow into a smart five-bedroom property.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin has a hair-raising experience at a barbers in Rochdale, Lancashire, while Martin Roberts looks round a great bungalow in Alsager, Cheshire, and Lucy Alexander sees all the potential in a piece of land in Eccles in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.desc: Former cheerleader Valerie Zavala is invited to a party with high school football players and cheerleaders; she is found dead; investigators collect home video from the party to find clues to identify her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Brought Roses and a Gun
programme.desc: Andrea believes that Ray Clark is the man of her dreams. But when she reveals shes pregnant, Ray becomes a nightmare. He stalks her and tortures their infant son. Andrea and her baby narrowly escape, but the next woman Ray meets isnt so lucky.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Tonja Balden doesnt know the charming man she meets at a bar, Andrew Luster, hides a twisted secret, that he is videotaping his heinous crimes.

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: After meeting a woman online, Alan Lee Lama moves across the country to be with her. He gets caught up in a love triangle: who will live and who will die?

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: After Alicia DeBolt suddenly goes missing, police discover a string of texts on her mobile phone. Soon after they begin their investigation, they close in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Looking at the phenomenon of high-profile criminal cases where people publically claim they are innocent about a crime they have committed.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: In Our Blood: The Forever Chemicals Scandal
programme.desc: After an environmental journalists investigation revealed Bentham to be the most contaminated place ever recorded in the UK for PFAS, residents undergo blood testing to find out whether the pollution in the environment has entered their bodies.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: A daily delivery of bespoke Mindfulness content designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Ant and Decs Limitless Win
programme.desc: Firefighting heroes Harry and Ben are confident they can handle the pressure of the Limitless Ladder to win a life-changing amount of money - Ben dreams of taking his family to Disneyland while Harry is determined to buy a new house with his partner, so Ant and Dec try to help make both dreams come true as they climb the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as `EastEnders royalty Natalie Cassidy and TV host Angellica Bell power up against athletes Jonnie Peacock and Greg Rutherford for charity.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and his team are in Salford to create an eco-inspired kitchen garden, for a community hero who likes to feed everyone and is passionate about recycling. Alan, Frances Tophill and Katie Rushworth recycle, re-use and go green to create a quaint, mix and match garden thats designed to provide a bounty of flowers and food. Meanwhile, David Domoney is tasked with creating an edible and floral delight on the tiny deck next to a moored-up narrowboat, inspired by the boat owners travelling life.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan at Manor Farm this time are Sarah Parish and Peter Andre to provide the chat - as we catch up with zebras currently residing in Warwickshire and learn how to revive our houseplants after the winter months. Plus, a couple of llamas make quite an impression.

programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: James Martins Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is back in the kitchen and is joined by Olympic gold medal-winning rower James Cracknell, chefs Meliz Berg and John Hooker, and First Dates barman Merlin Griffiths.

programme.title: Raymond Blancs Royal Kitchen Gardens
programme.desc: Raymond Blanc journeys to the northernly tip of Scotland and the majestic Castle of Mey that was once home to Queen Elizabeth the Queen Mother.

programme.title: James Martins British Adventure
programme.desc: Following on from his French and American Adventures, James Martin explores the British culinary offerings.

programme.title: ITV News

programme.title: ITV Racing Live LIVE
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani presents live racing from Doncaster and Kempton. Theres also a high class sprint in the Cammidge Trophy, plus the juveniles line up in the Brocklesby Stakes. Analysis comes from Adele Mulrennan and Jason Weaver, reporting from Oli Bell and commentary from Richard Hoiles.

programme.title: Jimmy and Shivis Farmhouse Breakfast
programme.desc: Jimmy and Shivi are joined in the kitchen by A Place in the Sun presenter and musician Leah Charles-King for cooking, chat and craft - after rustling up a masala omelette for breakfast and fruit sandwiches for an afternoon tea, artist Marion Sidebottom shows the trio how to make beautiful pictures using the magic of the sun. programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a local businesswoman is brutally bludgeoned to death, it appears to be a blackmail plot gone wrong. However, as the bodies begin to pile up, Lewis and Hathaway realise that there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case - and they must uncover it if they are to stop the murders.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.desc: In the sleepy English village of St Mary Mead, one man - Colonel Protheroe - is intensely disliked by everyone. Even the vicar has good reason to want to murder him. Then Protheroe is found with a bullet through the head, slumped over the desk in the vicarage study. The obvious suspects seem to be the colonels wife or her lover - but have they been set up? Miss Marple unpicks the truth behind the crime.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: The Ligurian coast of Italy is no holiday for Rosemary and Laura as they create a restaurant garden for Emma Standish. During a tour of the glorious Giardini Tremonti, the girls are propelled into a mystery when a woman in their party is killed. As they investigate her identity, there are further revelations - and further deaths.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: Rosemary and Laura become involved when an archaeologist, who posed as Rosemary to gain access to the formerly perfect gardens of a large estate, is found murdered.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a solicitor falls from a roof to his death, Barnaby and Scott investigate whether it was suicide or murder. They discover that a rival lawyer was spreading harmful rumours about the dead man, but when this man is drugged and killed as well, the motive looks like revenge - but for what?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott delve into the murder of a visitor to Plummers Relish factory, and discover that the dead man was employed by a rival company. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When retired music teacher Arthur Leggott is battered to death at his cottage, an unpublished musical score by the late Joan Alder, famous composer of `Midsomer Rhapsody, is unearthed.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: Magazine show to complement coverage of ITV horse racing - it is presented on-site from the main course each Saturday with additional weekday programmes during the big festivals.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces football highlights from November 1971, including an impressive Manchester City performance at Highbury against Arsenal, with Colin Bell and Franny Lee to the fore. Plus, action from Wolverhampton Wanderers against title contenders Derby County, and from the fourth division, Colchester United against Brentford. With analysis from Jimmy Hill.

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: Cadfael discovers that not all pilgrims are as pious as they seem when a putrid corpse is discovered on Holy Day.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Backstage at Britains last remaining firework factory, founded by the Reverend Ron Lancaster 50 years ago, with displays entertaining millions. Also, how to bake the perfect pork pie in Melton Mowbray, a town where the pies are protected by law.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Handsome Lt Sharpe joins forces with the South Essex regiment and is ordered to destroy a key bridge, but owing to incompetence in high places, the regimental colours are lost. However, a dying officer requests that Sharpe try to capture a French Eagle in an act of retaliation, and Sharpe and his men soon find themselves playing a key role in the Battle of Talavera.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live LIVE
programme.desc: Live coverage of the 2026 Dubai World Cup from Meydan, a race which features an illustrious roll of honour, with some of the biggest names in flat racing having won the race. The 2025 renewal was won by the 80/1 outsider Hit Snow.

programme.desc: A selection of the best hot shots from ITV Sports snooker coverage.

programme.desc: Live coverage from the Gallagher PREM as Saracens take on Northampton Saints in The Showdown at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

programme.title: Football League Legends
programme.desc: A selection of goals from some of the superstars of the game who played in the old first division in the 1970s, 1980s and 1990, including Kevin Keegan, Paul Gascoigne, Glenn Hoddle and Kenny Dalglish and many others.

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.desc: Action from the days games in the Football League, including Huddersfield v Cardiff, Bradford v Plymouth, Northampton v Barnsley and Rotherham v Luton in League One.

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: British agent James Bond investigates the disappearance of an Anglo-American space shuttle, which has fallen into the hands of a billionaire megalomaniac intent on world domination. Along the way, Bond has to contend with giant, steel-toothed hit man Jaws, before stowing away on a flight to a space station being used as a colony to breed a genetically `pure race.

programme.title: The Best of the 70s
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1970s - from horse racing to table football, Formula 1 to darts - and including many iconic and memorable moments.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The narrator provides insight into the world of the automobile industry while highlighting the latest car models that are released in the international market.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: The latest motorsport news and action from around the globe. From Superbikes to Formula One, Motorsport Mundial has the latest action and talking points from the motorsport world.

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: Cadfael discovers that not all pilgrims are as pious as they seem when a putrid corpse is discovered on Holy Day.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the days games in the Football League, including Huddersfield v Cardiff, Bradford v Plymouth, Northampton v Barnsley and Rotherham v Luton in League One.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: We reach the much-anticipated climax of the 1977-78 season as the Division One trophy is lifted along with great action including West Ham facing the threat of relegation as they take on Liverpool, Brighton battling Blackpool, and Cambridge hosting Exeter at the City Ground.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster said to rise from the depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Meet the family firm making traditional haggis - the national dish of Scotland which might not have come from Scotland after all. Learn what goes into making a set of bowls fit for a champion. Discover how a firm makes the wheelbarrows that helped rebuild Britain. Plus, meet a team making pairs of classic brogues that are in demand around the world.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Presenter, motorcycle adventurer and writer, Henry Cole takes a look at the world of motorcycling.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sharpes resolve is severely tested with the return of an evil villain from his past. He also loses his hard-earned captaincy, his company lose their Green Jackets, and they are brutalised under the command of Sergeant Hakeswill.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: When Lady Augustus Farthindale, a beautiful noblewoman, is taken hostage by a group of deserters, the dashing Richard Sharpe is sent with the ransom. However, when the leader of the band turns out to be none other than his old enemy Obadiah Hakeswill, it soon transpires that Sharpe has been tricked and the ransom doubled.

programme.title: NHL Hockey LIVE
programme.sub-title: Florida Panthers at New York Rangers
programme.desc: Live coverage from the NHL as the New York Rangers take on the Florida Panthers at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at craftsmen making acoustic guitars fit for the stars, and the mass production of cooking oil.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: More from ITVs sports archives as Richard Henwood takes a look back at The Indoor League. A show about 1970s pub games presented by Yorkshires cricketing great Fred Trueman.

programme.title: Nine Dart Finishes
programme.desc: A selection of nine dart finishes from ITV Sports darts coverage through the years. Every darts player strives to produce a perfect nine dart finish, but under the bright lights of the TV cameras, this pinnacle of darting prowess is even more impressive.

programme.title: Nijinskys Triple Crown
programme.desc: Short sports film about the legendary race horse.

programme.title: The 1% Club

programme.title: American Psycho
programme.desc: A successful high-living yuppie has a side which he keeps hidden from his friends and colleagues - his appetite for sadistic violence, murder and the music of Phil Collins. programme.desc: An account of the personal and professional lives of two US Navy officers at the time of the attack on Pearl Harbor. One is sent on a futile mission to try to sink the long-gone enemy fleet, and the other discovers that his wife has been killed in an air raid while on a clandestine meeting with another man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A space commander returns from a 30-year mission and finds that his girlfriend hasnt aged.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Salvadore Ross will do anything to win back his girlfriend - even buy her fathers compassion.

programme.title: Below
programme.desc: When a WWII American sub rescues some British survivors at sea, strange events make the crew suspect they have welcomed aboard a saboteur. A series of suspicious deaths suggest an even more sinister and horrifying explanation. Is the submarine cursed?

programme.title: Centurion
programme.desc: A band of soldiers attempts to rescue a Roman general from behind enemy lines.

programme.title: An Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: Sean Kane is a San Francisco cop whose partner is murdered by an Oriental drug ring. When his superiors takes him off the case, Kane quits his job and sets out to exact revenge.

programme.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man
programme.desc: Nick Halloway, after caught up in a freak accident, becomes invisible and is forced to flee by the CIA, who see him as an outstanding asset. His only help is anthropologist Alice Monroe who, as well as providing the love interest, helps him come to terms with his plight.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Having first found the net for Liverpool 20 years ago this week, relive every single one of Steven Gerrards 186 goals for the Reds in a bumper three hour goal-fest.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: John Banes joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 1987 Division One win over QPR.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown, from 130 to number 1, of Liverpools most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality.

programme.title: Salah: All The Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Mo Salah has scored for the Reds so far.

programme.title: Liverpools Sound: Kop Chants and Their Origins
programme.desc: We explore the history of Liverpools unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: We Are Liverpool
programme.desc: The man for the big occasion joins Peter McDowall and Jan Molby to relive the highlights of his Reds career.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: How a young lad from Huyton became a football icon and possibly the best player ever to wear a red shirt of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: He arrived as an unknown Finnish centre-half and left Anfield as one of Liverpool FCs all-time greats. This is Sami Hyypias story.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Gabby was heartbroken when she discovered her online love Kendrick was KILLED! But when Gabbys cousin suspects shes been mourning a fictional character, she calls in Nev and Kamie to uncover a truth thats stranger than fiction!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: William fell hard for Carmella but after spending hours on the phone, sharing the most intimate details together, Carmella wont meet up or even videochat! Nev and Kamie help William figure out what secrets Carmella is hiding!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Vonnis fallen for online sweet-talker Andrew and has sent him hundreds of dollars to prove his love. Now, Nev and Kamie help Vonni discover if Andrew is his one true love or just a silver-tongued scammer?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasnt come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Teen Mom UK
programme.desc: Chloe is in a celebratory mood, finally having the baby shower of her dreams. Sassi is rolling up her sleeves and working on her future. Amber is dealing with an old enemy. Mia wants to bury the hatchet with Maggie.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK

programme.desc: Catelynns anxiety rises when she notices her daughters head is flat on one side. Jade is nervous to meet Jenelle while Sean shops for an engagement ring. Brianas stress puts a toll on her mental health.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Now custodian Luke is embarking on officer training at Sandhurst and would like to take his great great grandfather Sidneys military chest with him.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Emma is hoping Julie and Amanda can work their magic on her quirky companion, a worn and cracked puppet from the 1970s. The puppet was a present from Emmas dad, who very sadly passed away not long after gifting the toy to his daughter.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive at the barn are Judith Holliman and her son James. They have brought a dear old friend - a stuffed owl called Wol. Judith clearly remembers him peeking out of her Christmas stocking when she was just a few years old, and they have been inseparable ever since. He was a gift from her beloved grandmother, who helped to raise her, and Wol is constant reminder of her grandmothers love. But the decades of hugs and kisses have rather worn out Wol, and he could really do with the expert care of bear ladies Amanda and Julie. Musical maestro David Burville welcomes Kathryn Freeman from Hertfordshire. He is excited to get his healing hands on her familys miniature piano, which is now in a sorry state. Kathryn grew up with five older sisters, and this pint-sized piano provided hours of entertainment for them all.

But the decades of hugs and kisses have rather worn out Wol, and he could really do with the expert care of bear ladies Amanda and Julie. programme.title: Catch My Killer

programme.title: Catch My Killer

programme.title: Catch My Killer

programme.title: Catch My Killer

programme.title: Julian Assange: Free at Last

programme.title: The Trayvon Hoax: Unmasking the Witness Fraud That Divided America
programme.desc: A look into the trial of George Zimmerman for the murder of Trayvon Martin.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: The story of volatile former chef Robert Trigg, who was found guilty killing two of his former girlfriends five years apart.

programme.title: 999 Killer on the Line
programme.desc: A closer look at the case of Darren Byrne, a former city trader who killed his wife then tried to burn down the family home after she discovered he was having an affair.

programme.title: Angel of Death
programme.desc: As the number of deaths at a medical centre climbs, the night staff begins to suspect that someone is poisoning the patients.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Harold Shipman
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was an English general practitioner and serial killer. He is considered to be one of the most prolific serial killers in modern history, with an estimated 250 victims.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: Surviving Sinaga
programme.desc: Reynhard Sinaga is the UKs most prolific rapist. Meeting men outside Manchester nightclubs, he drugged, sexually assaulted and filmed his depraved acts with at least 200 young men for the past 12 years. Featuring interviews with those affected.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings of Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Looking into the different theories about who was behind the brutal Whitechapel killings that rocked East London in 1888.

programme.title: Out of Mind, Out of Sight
programme.desc: Filmmaker John Kastner spends 18 months filming the daily lives of four patients in the Brockville Mental Health Centre in Ontario.

programme.title: Dying Out Loud
programme.desc: Female prisoners explain how they got to be facing life without parole, even though theyre innocent.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: David Harper and Hettie Jago - Day 5
programme.desc: Its the end of the tour for seasoned road tripper David Harper and his debutante rival Hettie Jago as they steer the 1980s Mercedes 280 SL towards their final auction. With money to spend and one last chance in the saleroom, they hit the antique shops and emporia of Lancashire. Hettie invests in varied lots from inkwells to hatstands, then blows the remainder of her budget on one, spectacular big-ticket item in a bid to outwit David. And isnt it typical?

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Upcycler extraordinaire EJ Osborne is scouring the skips at Woking Recycling Centre in Surrey. Hes on a mission to save three unwanted items he can restore, rejuvenate and sell on for a profit. Assisting EJ in his mission are trusty artisans Daniel Heath and Norman Wilkinson. A pair of bookcases are given some makeover magic by designer Daniel while carpenter Norman has the task of transforming a pine table and chairs. A Lloyd Loom style chair will be given the upcycling once-over by EJ.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore is at Witley Recycling Centre in Surrey searching for tired and unwanted items she can transform from skip-bound to stylish. With three items saved, Sarah turns to woodworker, Bruce Faulseit, to revamp an old oak table while luggage legend, Neil Wragg, attempts to get a needle through an airbed. Sarahs challenge is to bring a Victorian sofa into the 21st century.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At Midland Road Recycling Centre in Bradford, Jay Blades is sifting through the unwanted whatnots in search of three hidden gems he can take, transform and turn a profit on. Designer/maker Sarah Peterson has her hands full with a collection of carpet offcuts while upholsterer Simion Hawtin-Smith attempts to inject new life into a pair of tired chairs.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An adulterous orchid lover cares more for his flowers than his wife. When presented with a job in America, he thinks it the ideal opportunity to get rid of her through dastardly means.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An amiable swindler gets more than he bargained for when he buys a painting from a sweet old lady. Can she really be as naïve about the pictures worth as she seems?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two men are locked in a room together, and one is shot, but there is no sign of a gun.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Gossip columnist Lionel Brewster lets fly with his witty one-liners and his victims want revenge. Luckily two young actors, down on their luck, are on hand to offer their clients much more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An actor threatened by Satan worshippers agrees to star in a new film as long as no one knows where he goes upon leaving the studio each day.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A frightened embezzler (Steven Hill) stages his own suicide with the help of his double-crossing girlfriend (Joanna Moore).

programme.title: Oh! What a Lovely War
programme.desc: A series of episodes set in World War I England reveals the absurdity of war - mankinds most destructive activity.

programme.title: California Dreamin: The Songs of the Mamas and the Papas
programme.desc: Performance clips, home movies and interviews with members of the group show its folk/pop foundations.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: The Pale Horse
programme.desc: A man wants to know why he was on a list of names in the shoe of a dead woman. Three witches are suspected of being responsible for a series of murders.

programme.title: Bee Gees: One Night Only
programme.desc: The Bee Gees perform their greatest hits from the 60s, 70s, 80s and 90s, with guests including Celine Dion. From the MGM in Las Vegas in 1997.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: The Good is Blondie, a wandering gunman with a strong personal sense of honour; the Bad is Angel Eyes, a sadistic hit man who always hits his mark; and the Ugly is Tuco, a Mexican bandit whos always only looking out for himself. Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

programme.title: Angelheaded Hipster: The Songs of Marc Bolan and T. Rex
programme.desc: Celebrating the life and work of glam rock pioneer Marc Bolan, combined with a behind-the-scenes look at the tribute album of the same name.

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: ABC: Accompanied by the Southbank Sinfonia at the London Palladium, pop band ABC perform and discuss The Lexicon of Love, one of the 980s most successful debut albums.

programme.title: Discovering David Bowie
programme.desc: Leading music critics and DJs discuss the the life, music, legacy and larger-than-life stage characters of the glam rock legend.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: There was inspiration in the air the night this album was recorded. Includes interviews and rare performance footage.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: A Girl Cant Always Have Everything
programme.desc: Two struggling theatre actresses have very different off-stage personas. Suzy is a gold-digger who soon begins milking the theatres new backer for expensive gifts, but when he then wants to marry her, she calls on her more mild-mannered friend Pat for help. How loyal is she?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An amoral antique dealer masquerades as a man of the cloth to secure rock bottom prices in the name of a bogus charity, but his day of atonement may be nigh when he buys a rare item of furniture from an old farmer.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Old rivalries come to light when a mild-mannered clerk finds employment with the man who was his childhood bully. Tempers eventually boil over when he suspects his wife of infidelity.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When Anna has an eye transplant, her lover Roland sees her in a different light.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Henry Knox takes his revenge because he is being left out of the celebrations - but he acts too soon.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Everythings coming up roses for newlyweds (Patrick ONeal, Kathie Brown) using the garden as a graveyard for blackmailers.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After winning an acquittal on a murder charge, a lawyer (Martin Landau) discovers he defended a guilty man (Frank Gorshin).

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: This series explores the evolution of art, revealing the struggles and secrets behind historys masterpieces.

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: This series explores the evolution of art, revealing the struggles and secrets behind historys masterpieces.

programme.title: The Stranger
programme.desc: A Nazi war criminal who has built a new identity and life in Connecticut, is sought by a dogged investigator in this classic film noir from Orson Welles.

programme.title: Simon and Garfunkel: Old Friends On Stage
In Restless Dreams: The Music of Paul Simon
programme.desc: Paul Simon follows him inside the studio making his new album Seven Psalms while looking back on his six-decade career with countless musical peaks from Sounds of Silence to Graceland.

programme.title: Cliff Richard and The Shadows: The Final Reunion
programme.desc: Cliff Richard and The Shadows mark the 50th anniversary of their first recordings with a 2009 concert for fans at the O2 Arena in London, featuring chart-toppers like Living Doll.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Opry Honors - Loretta Lynn: Carly Pearce, Ashley McBryde, Martina McBride, Crystal Gayle, Emmy Russell, Rhonda Vincent, Tayla Lynn
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2025
programme.sub-title: James At Isle Of Wight Festival
programme.desc: Musicians perform at the Isle Of Wight Festival, one of the UKs oldest music festivals. The event is hosted at Seaclose Park, Newport, in June 2025 and headlined by Sting, Justin Timberlake, and Stereophonics.

programme.title: Hired Gun
programme.desc: Just 20 feet from stardom, elite musicians share behind-the-scene stories of touring and what it takes to play songs with the worlds most iconic bands. Including interviews with Alice Cooper, Rob Zombie, Steve Vai, David Foster and Ray Parker Jr.

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: At Paisley Abbey, the rock band perform their breakthrough 1982 album, New Gold Dream (81-82-83-84), including the hit Promised You a Miracle.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian OConnor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Torettos gang led to the motorised miscreants exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: A test pilot is granted a mystical green ring that bestows him with otherworldly powers, as well as membership into an intergalactic squadron tasked with keeping peace within the universe. Based on DC Comics characters.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a gang of LA street racers while investigating a rash of truck robberies.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: When Trojan prince Paris woos Helen, Queen of Sparta, away from her husband Menelaus, the legendary warrior Achilles is called to lead the armies of Greece against the city fortress of Troy.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs. Mutants
programme.desc: Gotham City faces catastrophe when Mr Freeze transforms Killer Croc and Bane into mega-sized mutant monsters. As the gigantic villains go on the rampage, its up to the caped crusader to cut them down to size.

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
programme.desc: Batman and Robin have their hands full when Penguin, The Joker, Riddler and Catwoman join forces.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: The humans and animals believe a werewolf is on the loose, so former hunter Shaw uses the opportunity to re-open the season. Boog, Elliot, and Mr Weenie have to face their fears and find the werewolf to get the season closed permanently.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Draculas spell turns a woman and her loved ones into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankensteins monster.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood dreams of discovering an idea that will change peoples lives forever, and after several misguided attempts he may just have done it. Flint has invented a machine that can turn water into delicious food, and, when his first demonstration accidentally sends the machine shooting into the clouds, cheeseburgers begin raining down from the sky.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Discovering that his most-famous machine is now creating animal/vegetable hybrids, inventor Flint Lockwood and his friends venture forth to save the world from tacodiles, shrimpanzees and other creatures.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody and Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: The humans and animals believe a werewolf is on the loose, so former hunter Shaw uses the opportunity to re-open the season. Boog, Elliot, and Mr Weenie have to face their fears and find the werewolf to get the season closed permanently.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Ted
programme.desc: When John Bennett was a little boy, he made a wish that Ted, his beloved teddy bear, would come alive. Thirty years later, foul-mouthed Ted is still Johns constant companion, much to the chagrin of Lori, Johns girlfriend. Though Loris displeasure is exacerbated by the pairs constant consumption of beer and weed, shes not the one whos most disappointed with John; it may take the intervention of Johns boyhood toy to help him grow up at last.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Teddy bear Ted seeks legal help from a young lawyer and a legendary, civil-rights attorney when the law declares him to be property and not a person.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her sons science teacher.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training

Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Lets Dance
programme.desc: A widowed performer and her former dancing partner fight her wealthy mother-in-law for custody of her son.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Love Story

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Lets Dance
programme.desc: A widowed performer and her former dancing partner fight her wealthy mother-in-law for custody of her son.

programme.title: Finding You
programme.desc: A violinist travels to an Irish village to begin her semester abroad, where romance sparks between her and a handsome actor, igniting a journey of discovery.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: A woman undergoes treatment to battle breast cancer while her best friend tries to get pregnant.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: High school oddball Ducky idolises his best friend Andie but shes smitten with wealthy classmate Blane who might be interested - if she wasnt so poor. Do the pair have a future together?

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon

programme.desc: Discover some of the very best Sky Originals to watch with the whole family, from Monster Family to The Amazing Maurice.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: When a familys pet cat is called, they manage to resurrect the animal by placing it in an Indian burial ground which, it is believed, can revive the dead, although in doing so they create a monster.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a desolate near future, vicious motorcycle gangs roam the wastelands attacking what is left of civilisation. With law and order in chaos, a tough police patrolman enforces a new kind of law - cold-blooded revenge - when his family is murdered by one of the gangs.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Mad Max 3: Beyond Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: After returning to his Hawaiian home, a soldier takes a job with a tourist bureau against the advice of his parents.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: After returning to his Hawaiian home, a soldier takes a job with a tourist bureau against the advice of his parents.

programme.title: Were the Millers
programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Washed-up stuntman Luo seeks help from his estranged daughter and her lawyer boyfriend when his beloved stunt horse may be auctioned off to pay his debts. Luo and Red Hare become a media sensation when their fight with debt collectors goes viral.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two inseparable best friends navigate the last weeks of high school and are invited to a gigantic house party. Together with their nerdy friend, they spend a long day trying to score enough alcohol to supply the party and inebriate two girls in order to kick-start their sex lives before they go off to college. Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet whos unlucky in love believes hes struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butchers shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.desc: Explore the captivating cityscape, where Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop, before meeting the wilder Hill Troops old alpha, Aarav.

programme.title: Macaque Island
programme.desc: The Hill Troop invades the Street Troops turf before the Sisterhood plots to kidnap Saras baby, and the alpha Loci discovers that his old rival has made a return.

programme.title: Macaque Island
programme.desc: A brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf, before alpha wannabe Ajit makes his move.

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a constant fight for survival.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David descends beneath the waves at night in the state of the art Triton submersible, the first of its kind to visit the reef. He meets some of the tiny coral animals that built the reef and helped to turn it into an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David continues his exploration of the Great Barrier Reef, aboard the research vessel the Alucia. He discovers the incredible animals that visit the reef every year, from birds to whales, some travelling thousands of kilometres to get there.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Two families explore the evolutionary journey of woodpeckers and the role they play in each ecosystem that they inhabit.

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a constant fight for survival.

programme.title: Beast of The Big Blue
programme.desc: Explores the Snare Islands, located in the Southern Ocean, where penguins and other seabirds reside.

programme.title: Beast of The Big Blue
programme.desc: Join sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls and fairy prions on New Zealands Otago Peninsula as they find mates and nurture the next generation.

programme.title: Loons: A Cry From the Mist
programme.desc: Biologists race against the clock as they try to figure out why North American loons are suddenly in danger. Unlocks the mysterious lives of these beloved birds, and ponders whether their cries will continue to be summers soundtrack.

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africas shoreline for over 400 kilometres.

programme.desc: The team travel to Dalston Hall. Although it is now a welcoming modern hotel, the Hall has a history of murderous betrayal and a reputation for poltergeists.

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit Tretower court and castle in Wales, which is reportedly inhabited by the ghost of a white lady thought to be the wife of Roger Vaughan who built Tretower Court in the 1400s.

programme.title: Great Raids of World War II

programme.desc: The Trotters flat is getting very crowded. Rodney has left Cassandra and returned home, and Dels girlfriend Raquel has moved in. Del is worried because Rodney is drinking too much and its affecting his new job with Cassandras father. Will Dels plan to organise a romantic night for Rodney and Cassandra bring the bickering young couple back together?

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Dels sticking his oar in again as he attempts to get Rodneys relationship with Cassandra back on the rails by craftily organising a rendezvous between them. Raquel also benefits from Dels helping hand.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: A pregnant Raquel has accepted Dels marriage proposal but must find the whereabouts of her first husband, whom she hasnt seen for seven years, so she can get a divorce.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: When Del gets invited to a reunion at his old school, he cant wait to meet up with his former classmates, but one of them isnt quite as friendly as Del would like.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.sub-title: He Aint Heavy, Hes My Uncle
programme.desc: Street crime is affecting the tenants of Nelson Mandela House and when Uncle Albert is one of the victims, Del decides to take the law into his own hands. Meanwhile, Rodney has become a new director in Trotters Independent Traders. His first assignment - to clean the car.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.sub-title: Three Men, A Woman and a Baby
programme.desc: Rodney and Albert contemplate the prospect of Del the doting dad. Meanwhile, Raquel has the baby blues, and Rodneys bedroom is being turned into a nursery.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: After his initial angry reaction to Staceys news, Uncle Bryn agrees to drive everyone to Essex to meet the Shipmans. Pam has laid on a cracking spread and the party goes with a bang, but then Gavin and Stacey make an announcement that throws all the bonhomie out the window.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin is uncomfortable with Gwen and Bryn knowing the ins and outs of his and Staceys sex life, and Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship by making a staggering suggestion. Meanwhile, Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows, and everyone heads to Billericay to help them celebrate. But how will Dave react to the bombshell revelation about the curry night in Essex?

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del arms himself with red braces and yuppy sorts and goes forth to do battle. Unfortunately, his flirtation with the yuppie world doesnt seem to be as successful as Rodneys flirtation with the lovely Cassandra.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del Boy, complete with yuppie trimmings, Mercedes key ring, filofax and aluminium briefcase, gets involved in a shady business deal that blows up in his face.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, Wagatha Christie gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.
